spell.spell_desc: Ix

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Ixia performs best when paired with "Set" Tanks like Tigreal who can group the entire enemy team into one spot. Because her Ultimate covers a wide area but requires her to stay still, having a teammate who can stun multiple enemies at once allows Ixia to safely trigger her full damage combo. This synergy ensures that the enemies are trapped inside her firing range with no way to escape her massive burst damage, almost always guaranteeing a won teamfight and a clear path to victory

counters.counter_desc: Ixia dominates marksmen who have no mobility. Her Skill 2 can easily pull them in, and her Ultimate has a much longer range than their basic attacks. In the Gold Lane, she can safely poke them out of the game and take a massive gold lead

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus entirely on safely clearing your minion waves and avoiding unnecessary aggressive trades until you have your first core item. Use your first skill to poke enemies from a distance and stay near your turret if the enemy jungler is missing from the map. Your goal here is to reach level 4 as quickly as possible without dying so you can support your team during the first Turtle contest

This is where you shine by positioning yourself behind your tanks and waiting for the enemies to use their crowd control skills before opening your Ultimate. Always keep your Flicker ready to adjust your position during your Full Barrage to maximize your damage area. If you stay alive and keep your distance, your massive area-of-effect damage and lifesteal will allow you to wipe out the entire enemy team and end the game

emblems.emblem_desc: The Custom Assassin Emblem is the best choice for Ixia because it provides a significant boost to Physical Penetration and Adaptive Penetration, allowing her to melt through tanks and squishy heroes alike. I have specifically chosen the War Cry talent because Ixia can trigger it very easily with her rapid-fire basic attacks and skills. Once active, the 8% damage increase applies to her entire Ultimate duration, making her a devastating force in teamfights. To complement this, you should use talents that focus on extra Physical Attack and Weapon Master to ensure your lifesteal and damage scaling reach their maximum potential by the late game

equips.equip_desc: This build is designed to finish off enemies instantly. Corrosion Scythe provides the necessary slow to keep targets trapped, while Sky Piercer ensures they cannot escape with low health. With the added range from Malefic Gun, you can safely melt the entire enemy team from a distance and secure an easy victory

This set is perfect for taking down durable heroes and high-HP tanks. By combining Demon Hunter Sword with Hunter Strike, you gain the physical penetration and attack speed needed to shred through any armor. It offers the perfect balance of consistent damage and kiting ability for long, difficult teamfights

hero.hero_overview: Ixia is a high-sustain Marksman who dominates the Gold Lane. Unlike other marksmen, she doesn't rely on critical hits. Instead, she uses her Passive (Siphon Starlium) to heal herself while dealing massive AoE damage. She is a teamfight specialist—when she opens her Ultimate, the entire enemy team has to run or die.
hero.hero_strength: The greatest strength of Ixia lies in her unmatched area-of-effect damage which allows her to pressure an entire enemy team simultaneously during objective contests like Lord or Turtle. She possesses incredible natural sustain from her lifesteal abilities, meaning she can often outlast other marksmen in a direct trade of blows. Additionally, her kit includes excellent crowd control that can pull enemies together or slow them down, making it nearly impossible for them to escape her firing range once she has locked onto them. This makes her a top-tier pick for players who love to carry through massive teamfight participation.
hero.hero_weakness: Despite her high damage, Ixia is extremely vulnerable due to her lack of mobility as she has no built-in dash or escape skills to get away from aggressive assassins. Her biggest risk occurs during her Ultimate, which forces her to remain completely stationary and leaves her open to long-range mages or quick dive heroes. She also requires a significant amount of gold to reach her power spike, meaning she can be easily bullied in the very early stages of the game if her team does not provide her with enough protection and space to farm

data.recommend: I designed these easy, high-damage builds to help you dominate and rank up fast! Give them a try and let me know how they work for you. Good luck on the Land of Dawn

spell.spell_desc: Flicker while your Ultimate is already active; this will surprise the enemy by shifting your entire damage zone without canceling the skill. Beyond offense, it is your only reliable way to dodge deadly crowd control or leap over walls when assassins are chasing you, making it a mandatory pick for survival and playmaking

equips.equip_desc:
Ixia doesn't rely on crit.

She relies on:

Attack Speed

On-hit effects

Sustained DPS

That's why Golden Staff + DHS + Corrosion Scythe is her strongest core combo.

hero.hero_overview:
Ixia is a Marksman in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang known for her continuous area damage and teamfight dominance. Unlike burst-type marksmen, Ixia excels in extended fights, dealing massive sustained DPS while controlling space with her wide- range ultimate.

She shines most in:

5v5 team fights

Objective contests (Lord & Turtle)

Defensive sieges and base defense

Her ultimate transforms her basic attacks into wide AoE beams, allowing her to melt grouped enemies from a safe position.
hero.hero_strength:
Insane Teamfight Damage

Ixia's ultimate can hit multiple enemies at once. If

enemies group together, she can deal devastating AoE damage.

Strong Sustain

She has built-in lifesteal and healing effects, making her difficult to kill during extended fights.


Objective Control

Excellent at:

Securing Lord

Taking Turtle

Clearing waves quickly

Her AoE attacks make her one of the best late-game

objective DPS heroes.

Late-Game Monster

With proper positioning and items, Ixia becomes a damage machine in late game.
hero.hero_weakness:
No Mobility Skill

Ixia has no dash or blink. If caught by assassins, escape becomes very difficult.

Positioning Dependent

Bad positioning = instant death. She requires good map awareness and protection.

Weak Early Game

Before core items, her damage feels underwhelming compared to other marksmen.


Vulnerable to Burst Assassins

Heroes like:

Hayabusa

Lancelot

Fanny

can easily eliminate her if she is out of position.

spell.spell_desc:
Spell Recommendation Summary

Flicker - Most balanced & safest

Inspire - Highest damage potential

Purify - Anti-CC counter pick

data.title: Ixia Guide

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
- Stars: 4 out of 5
- Description: Ixia synergizes well with heroes that can provide crowd control and set up opportunities for her ultimate. She also benefits from heroes that can protect her from being targeted.

counters.counter_desc:
Counters:
 
- Stars: 4 out of 5
- Description: Ixia is countered by heroes with high mobility and burst damage, as they can quickly close the gap and eliminate her before she can deal significant damage.

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on farming efficiently and securing early kills. Watch out for ganks and communicate with your team. Prioritize objectives like towers and buffs.

emblems.emblem_desc: focuses on boosting her Marksman capabilities, emphasizing attack speed, physical power, and penetration to maximize her unique passive that consumes stacks for enhanced damage and significant health regen, making Marksman Emblem with talents like Swift (attack speed), Tenacity (defense), and Quantum Charge (energy/burst) or even Assassin for more damage core choices, though items matter more for her scaling
emblems.emblem_title: usually focuses on the Marksman Emblem or sometimes the Assassin Emblem

equips.equip_desc:
Corrosion Scythe: Essential for attack speed and slowing enemies, synergizing with her passive.
Sea Halberd: Offers attack speed, damage, and anti-healing, great against sustain heroes.
Malefic Roar (or Malefic Gun): Provides physical penetration to shred tanks.
Blade of Despair (BoD): High damage boost, especially when enemies are low, enhancing her passive.
Wind of Nature (WoN) / Rose Gold Meteor: Defensive options for surviving burst damage (physical/magic, respectively).

hero.hero_overview: AoE damage & lifesteal,
hero.hero_strength: Sustain/Lifesteal: Her passive ability, "Siphon Starlium," allows her basic attacks and skills to apply stacks. Her third basic attack consumes these stacks to deal bonus physical damage and heals her for the same amount. This provides strong, consistent HP recovery without relying on traditional lifesteal items, making it difficult to push her out of the lane.
hero.hero_weakness: lack of inherent mobility (no dash), squishiness (poor survivability), and vulnerability to burst damage and hard Crowd Control (CC), especially from assassins or divers who can bypass her defenses and lock her down during her immobile ultimate. She relies heavily on positioning and her ultimate, making her susceptible to heroes with dashes, blink skills, or strong lockdown like Saber, Brody, or Khufra.

dominants.dominant_desc: As I've said earlier, Ixia is weak against heroes with great mobility (dash, escape skill), burst and crowd control. So use your common sense before you initiate a fight if you encounter enemy heroes that has her weakness the best thing you do is ask for teammate help. In early game you can easily kill an enemy hero in a 1vs1 fight (both level 1). Use wind of nature or winter crown whenever you encounter enemies with great attack speed or crowd control/burst skill and you can also purchase Rose gold for additional survivability. I SUGGEST ALSO TO PRACTICE THIS HERO FIRST BEFORE YOU USE THIS IN RANKED GAME.

emblems.emblem_desc: This is the perfect emblems fro her. Keep note that her passive effect rely on her damage so make sure to maximize it. Penetration is a must for her that's why always choose assassin emblem with war cry as the last emblem talent to maximize her efficiency

equips.equip_desc: Standard build for Ixia for great damage and sustain.
Enemies like (Wanwan, Irithel, Granger) is her weakness so use this items that can help her last in a fight. U can also change wind chant to Winter Crown

hero.hero_overview: Ixia is Great Marksman Hero that can wipe out all enemy heroes using her Ultimate with good position and support from teammates. She is good marksman in early game that can kill enemy marksman in 1v1 fight (both level 1) given that she has passive that sustain her in a fight. Keep in mind that Ixia cannot move while channeling her Ult so a good position is a big must when casting her Ult.
hero.hero_strength: an enemy heroes that doesn't have any dash or escape skill is a big benefit for her knowing that she has passive that can sustain her in a fight. In teamfight, you can use her ult to wipe out enemies. It would be a great help as well if you have a crowd control teammates to maximize her ult.
hero.hero_weakness: Stun, burst, heroes with dash or escape skill and heroes with great mobility is her biggest weakness. (WANWAN, GRANGER, CICI, etc) unlike miya, layla, moscov, irithel, etc. Ixia's basic attack is not continuous so she must be careful with marskmen heroes with great attack speed especially those who are using inspire battle spell. Purchasing wind of nature or winter can help her survivability. Remember, when using her ult you must do a good positioning to prevent it from being interrupted or being attack freely from enemies.

hero.hero_overview: Ixia is a high-damage Marksman for the Gold Lane. Her passive gives her great LIFESTEAL and damage against marked enemies. Her main strength is her ULTIMATE, which covers a huge area and destroys enemies in team fights. Position carefully behind your team, as she has no escape skills. Perfect for players who like high-impact finishes!
hero.hero_strength:
Hits multiple enemies at once during team fights.

Passive ability heals her HP, helping her stay in the lane longer.

Can deal damage from a very long and safe distance.

Efficient at melting down enemies with high health points.
hero.hero_weakness:
Has no dash or blink skills to run away from danger.

Must stand still while using her Ultimate, making her an easy target.

Easily killed by Assassins who can jump on her quickly.

Relies heavily on teammates to protect her while she attacks.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Ixia is very strong, and with her ultimate ability she has extremely high range.
Her deadly weakness is crowd control effects. That is why Diggie is an excellent partner for Ixia.

Any tank like Tigreal, Atlas, or Minotaur that can disable and gather enemies is a deadly partner with Ixia.

They also protect her very well.

counters.counter_desc: There is no doubt that any hero with a one-shot combo, such as Kagura, Eudora, Kadita, or Saber, is a perfect counter to Ixia. Unlike Clint, Ixia has no mobility at all. That is why she can be easily countered by anything that relies on a single combo in battle.

There are also several marksman counters to her, such as Brody, Irithel, and Granger — basically any hero with longer range than Ixia — but I will choose Lesley.

A skilled Lesley player is a nightmare for Ixia.

emblems.emblem_desc: Because we need to make ixias damge more and more. Second reason we use assassins build because we use the skills to damage more then the basic attack, that reason we dont use marksman builds.

equips.equip_desc:
The Scythe is usually my first item. I never go for boots early because Ixia is relatively fast and has extremely high early game damage. Thanks to her passive, she can even outdamage Brody or Clint if we bet on who kills faster. That is why slowing enemies with Corrosion Scythe is the best opening idea. In very rare cases such as when the enemy team has a healer or very high HP I start with Sea Halberd instead.

The second item depends on the situation. If I am ahead I will build Sky Piercer. Otherwise I will go for Sea Halberd. The rest of the items stay the same but I will explain a bit about the final slot Blade of Despair. Against low HP heroes and if I did not need to sell my boots I will use it. However if I already sold my boots and I need to reposition a lot because of the enemy I will not use Blade of Despair. Instead I will pick Hunter Strike if the enemy team requires quick executions. If they have tanks or armor heavy builds I will go for Demon Hunter Sword.

Finally after finishing my main build I will sell the boots. The replacement depends on the enemy lineup. Rose Gold Meteor if there are burst mages like Eudora or Kagura. Wind of Nature if physical damage dealers like Miya are giving me trouble. Winter Crown which I rarely use if the enemy has many annoying heroes with both physical and magical damage

data.title: Ixia build

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Ixia's ult is extremely powerfull combined with tigreal ult, it makes you able to have ennemies locked down and easy to attack with your skills
Like for tigreal, the stuns provided by minotaur is realy helpfull, the heal can also save you from dangerous situations.
His ult allow you to focus on yours, however, you have to preshoot a little because of his ult mouvement
Johnson ult can provide much needed movement to ixia in order to join fights and ult but, you have to time ixia's ultimate so that you dont ult to close from the ennemy
His crowd control with his ultimate can bring ennemies close enough so that you can place everyone of them inside your skills, plus his second skill can save you from dangerous situations

counters.counter_desc: The most dangerous thing about Suyou is that he can close up the distance and place a quick combo easely, it is hard to counter it but it is possible
Because of her mobility and anti CC, you cannot rely on your ult to fight wanwan, the thing you should focus on is more to make sure she does not break all the marks

dominants.dominant_desc: In the early game, this set is surprisingly powerfull, if, after the first mark is placed, you use inspire, the healing is optimal since it is increased by ixia's passive, i recomand her in early 1v1 if you feel like you can do it

Since ixia is locked down during ult, you have to be sure that you can ult safely, if an ennemy is in the backlane, it can be punished, do not hesitate to use inspire if you are low to benefit from the anti armor it provides

emblems.emblem_desc: The marksman emblem is used in order to have a better lifesteal and increases the attack speed, you then have War cry and thrill to increase your damages and Tenacity helps you to have better defenses when low hp

equips.equip_desc: One of the major items for ixia is the corrosion scythe since, thanks to the item's passive, she gains attack speed when she hits targets and can slow them when they are in her ult, then skypiercer is a must have to finish ennemies before they have the time to go out of the ult, sea halberd is used to reduce healing which is used by a majority, if not every single marksman, malefic Gun incresses the distance of the basic attacks in order to have better chances against heros such as Layla who haves a long range for their basic attacks. Hunter Strike is then taken in order to have better penetration and the ability to reduce the istance faster

hero.hero_strength: Paired with crowd control heros such as Tigreal, she can do a lot of damages, her heal is extremely usefull to stay in lane
hero.hero_weakness: It is easy to close the distance and her ultimate make her a static target for ennemies.

spell.spell_desc: If you dont have Flicker or dont want to use it, i find inspire being a great second choice because of the increased regeneration which can save you in dangerous situations where flicker wouldnt be usefull

emblems.emblem_desc: It's gives you high Physical Attack and Magic Power

hero.hero_overview:
Ixia's Basic Attacks and skills apply a stack of Starlium Charge to enemies on hit. When Ixia performs a Basic Attack on an enemy with two stacks of Starlium Charge, the attack will consume the stacks and be replaced with Siphon Starlium, dealing (+150% Total Physical Attack) (+200 Lifesteal) plus (+10*Hero Level) Physical Damage to the target. Ixia recovers HP equal to the damage dealt by Siphon Starlium (only 20(+150 Lifesteal)% against non-hero units).

Siphon Starlium can trigger on all enemies in front of Ixia that are within her Basic Attack range, but it cannot Crit. Ixia's Basic Attacks cannot trigger Lifesteal.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker Blink a fixed distance in the target direction and gain 5 (+1*Hero Level) extra Physical & Magic Defense afterward for 1s.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Ixia works well with crowd control heroes like Atlas, Tigreal, and Khufra. Their strong initiations allow Ixia to easily lock down multiple enemies with her skills and ultimate, maximizing her damage potential in team fights.

counters.counter_desc: Ixia struggles against burst assassins like Ling, Lancelot, and Hayabusa. These heroes can dive into the backline and eliminate her quickly before she has a chance to deal significant damage. Positioning and map awareness are crucial to survive.

dominants.dominant_desc: Stay behind your frontline during team fights. Use Skill 2 to immobilize key targets and activate your ultimate for maximum DPS. Always reposition after using your skills to stay safe.

hero.hero_overview: The heroine Melissa is one of the archer heroes, her appearance is very sweet and cute, you can play with her in the gold path, and you can even play with her in the experience path, but you must train on her more to play with her in the experience path, her role in the game is effective especially in facing thugs because she has explosive and long-range damage, I forgot to say that Melissa has a doll and a needle, when you throw a doll and hit enemies, you will control the doll and throw strikes through it, I advise you to play with Melissa, a heroine who is very controlling in the paths and facing meta heroes.
hero.hero_strength: Well, what is the strength of the heroine Melissa: The advantages of the lane or planting is that she has a long-range attack, and this is thanks to her skill again, as she throws her special doll towards enemies, and when she hits them, she will be able to throw a group of shots at them that hit them and kill them. Her attack is deadly. Melissa's real strength lies in team fighting. I advise when you play with Melissa to play alongside you an armored one like Tiger or Atlas and a slayer like Martis or Alpha. Melissa's strength is at the beginning of a normal match. I advise you to focus on collecting resources and gold and solving paths and not focusing on enemies too much. Kill them and destroy them in the middle of a match because Melissa must be equipped. In the late match, I will not talk. Try it yourself and you will see. She becomes terrifying. She can crush enemies with one attack.
hero.hero_weakness: If you want to play with Melissa, you should take the Haste spell because it will increase the critical hit, especially in the late game, and it will also be a critical hit for you that will help you in the beginning of the game. The Haste spell increases Melissa's damage to heroes and restores mana as well.
